todos.text: Train Iceberg climbing rose canes horizontally across Side Arbor — vine eyes + soft ties now while flexible
Cut back Distictis buccinatoria (Trumpet Vine on Fountain Wall) hard to framework — create structure as you cut
Move White Bougainvillea to back of BBQ bed
Cut back existing 6ft Fatsia — take 6-8 cuttings with rooting hormone
Selective deadwood removal on all hydrangeas — dead/crossing stems only
White Stripe bougainvillea — Super Bloom HALF strength to MOIST soil. Monthly.
Diseased rose — Safer spray every 7-14 days. Do NOT feed until healthy.
Cut back leggy tall geranium by half to two thirds
Move kitchen windowsill plants (Peperomia, Succulent, Mini Jade) to office once Rieger Begonias arrive
Monitor irrigation — check soil 48hrs after watering. Drop to 2x/week if still moist.
Spot plant all new plants with pots on ground first — step back to street, adjust, THEN plant
Confirm Breath of Heaven variety matches existing — check foliage color at nursery
Check nursery tag on fern in white smiley cat pot (plant stand) — ID species
Get remaining rose names from Side Arbor — varieties beyond Iceberg, Angel Face, Burst of Joy
ID David Austin rose variety in Back Rose Bed — check tag for exact name
Phormium orphan with trunk (actually a Cordyline) — find a home: BBQ bed, poolside, or large container
